reality-breaker.name: Reality Breaker
reality-breaker.description: Forged from the Void Sovereign's shattered prison. Each swing cracks reality. The ultimate warrior's weapon — a blade that can cut through anything, including the concept of 'unbreakable'.

codex-of-unmaking.name: Codex of Unmaking
codex-of-unmaking.description: The Void Sovereign's own spellbook — or what passes for one. Every page contains a spell that shouldn't exist. Reading it grants power that rewrites the rules of magic.

entropy-shroud.name: Entropy Shroud
entropy-shroud.description: A cloak woven from pure entropy. The wearer exists at the edge of reality — present but not quite real. Attacks pass through. Blades miss. You are the ghost between worlds.

binding-light-aegis.name: Binding Light Aegis
binding-light-aegis.description: A shield forged from the bindings that held the Void Sovereign. It radiates the pure, defiant light of reality refusing to end. The ultimate defensive artifact.

void-sovereign-fang.name: Void Sovereign's Fang
void-sovereign-fang.description: A bow carved from the Void Sovereign's tooth — a weapon made from the most dangerous entity in existence. Arrows fired from it carry the weight of oblivion.
